acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-perl-modules SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for This SIG contains all perl modules which are created by automation tools. The SIG has 17 core members and maintains 1460 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-perl-modules SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-perl-modules SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openerler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-perl-modules SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-perl-modules SIG maintains 1460 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-perl-modules.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-perl-modules SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-perl-modules SIG has 2 Maintainers, including: wei Xiong, xinwei Hu. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
